name: Hathora
description: Hathora — Serverless multiplayer game server platform with auto-scaling and per-region session routing.

seo.title: Hathora — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Hathora: Hathora — Serverless multiplayer game server platform with auto-scaling and per-region session routing.

when_to_use: Serverless multiplayer game servers with autoscaling and lobbies
Per-region game session allocation without managing servers
Instant multiplayer backend for Unity and Unreal game projects
Lobby and matchmaking system on managed infrastructure
Game server platform that scales from 10 to 10K concurrent games

pros: Real serverless model for game servers
cons: Cold start latency on first session
Pricing harder to predict at scale
review.verdict: The cleanest serverless multiplayer host today, with the usual serverless tradeoffs around cold starts.
review.best_for: Indie and mid-size studios with spiky multiplayer traffic
review.not_for: Persistent-world games needing always-on regional clusters

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
